summary: The task is complete in substance. The public note page now renders AI summary and tags directly beneath the title and before the markdown body in src/app/notes/[slug]/page.tsx, the note-detail CSS widens the title block and softens the support treatment in src/app/globals.css, and the updated Playwright coverage plus refreshed desktop/mobile snapshots substantively guard the new hierarchy and title-fit behavior. The provided deterministic check record shows both required gates passed on 2026-03-23: `npm run test:e2e -- --grep public-note` and `npm run verify`.
satisfied_exit_criteria: AI summary and AI tags appear beneath the title and above the body (`src/app/notes/[slug]/page.tsx:42-63` before `:65-69`).

Title wrapping uses the available width more intentionally via the widened card/title block and removal of the old narrow title cap (`src/app/globals.css:1006-1064`), and the regression test now checks heading width and line count (`tests/e2e/ui-public-note.spec.ts:192-220`).

The page remains calm and body-first: support copy is muted and smaller than body text, while the reading measure stays constrained (`src/app/globals.css:1089-1196`), and the desktop/mobile screenshots reflect that balance.
`npm run test:e2e -- --grep public-note` is recorded as passing in the deterministic check summary.
`npm run verify` is recorded as passing in the deterministic check summary.
